pr-evidence/clarify-sglang-benchmark-bou.gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 review found no blocking issues. The reviewer confirmed the docs and governance assertions clearly separate published vLLM latency/quality benchmark evidence from SGLang provider-backed native HiCache probe and connector-action integration evidence, and found no overclaims of new Databricks or SGLang latency/throughput/quality benchmark results. GitHub would not allow the reviewer process to approve because it authenticated as the PR author, so the clean result was posted as a review comment.

what_changed: Clarified the standalone Databricks benchmark entry points so V1 latency/quality rows are identified as vLLM benchmark runs.
Marked SGLang native HiCache artifacts as provider-backed probe and connector-action integration evidence, not live SGLang latency/quality benchmark results.
Added governance assertions that pin the benchmark/probe evidence boundary in the README, benchmark folders, and V1 requirements matrix.
pr-evidence/clarify-sglang-benchmark-bou.why: Benchmark readers should not have to inspect PR evidence or raw Databricks artifacts to distinguish published latency/quality benchmarks from native connector probe evidence; SGLang live decode-time prefix binding remains a future validation gate.
